name: Microwave Casseroled Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Chicken cooking time: 11 to 13 1/2 minutes per pound.
2. Defrost vegetables in package at High for 2 1/2 to 4 1/2 minutes. Set aside.
3. Place chicken in a 3-quart casserole, breast side down.
4. In a custard cup, melt butter at High for 20 to 45 seconds.
5. Add bouquet sauce. Brush back of chicken with half of the butter mixture.
6. Microwave at High for the first 3 minutes.
7. Reduce power to 50% (Medium). Microwave for the remainder of the first half of cooking time.
8. While chicken is microwaving, combine remaining ingredients in a small bowl.
9. After half of the total cooking time has elapsed, drain fat from the casserole.
10. Turn chicken breast side up and brush with butter sauce mixture.
11. Arrange noodle mixture around the chicken.
12. Microwave for the remaining time, or until the chicken is tender and legs move freely. Stir noodle mixture before serving.
13. Serves 4 to 6.
